source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A nitrogen line at 300 K, 0.5 MPa is connected to a turbine that exhausts to a closed, initially empty tank of 50 m^3. The turbine operates to a tank pressure of 0.5 MPa, at which point the temperature is 250 K. Assuming the entire process is adiabatic, determine the turbine work.
